description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot of green lawn, surrounded by several trees and shrubs. The house features a dark, multi-hipped roof and light-colored exterior walls, with a prominent front entrance and a double garage on one side. The backyard includes a medium-sized swimming pool and a paved patio area, partially shaded by a pergola. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, with additional windows distributed along the sides and rear. The driveway leads up to the garage, and a walkway connects the driveway to the main entrance. The overall design is spacious and open, typical of suburban ranch-style homes.
description: A spacious, single-story bungalow with a dark hipped roof, light exterior walls, a double garage, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped lawn with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and side windows, with trees lining the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and multiple rear-facing windows, with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, side windows, and driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
